HGSS.188.0000:
Professor Elm: Touch a Poké Ball to
see what Pokémon is inside!
HGSS.188.0001:
Professor Elm: So, you like [FF00,0003]CHIKORITA[FF00,0000],
the Grass-type Pokémon?
HGSS.188.0002:
Professor Elm: You’ll take [FF00,0001]CYNDAQUIL[FF00,0000],
the Fire-type Pokémon?
HGSS.188.0003:
Professor Elm: Do you want [FF00,0002]TOTODILE[FF00,0000],
the Water-type Pokémon?
HGSS.188.0004:
[FF00,0003]CHIKORITA[FF00,0000], the Grass-type Pokémon, is
in this Poké Ball!
HGSS.188.0005:
[FF00,0001]CYNDAQUIL[FF00,0000], the Fire-type Pokémon, is
in this Poké Ball!
HGSS.188.0006:
[FF00,0002]TOTODILE[FF00,0000], the Water-type Pokémon, is
in this Poké Ball!
HGSS.188.0007: Once you’ve decided, touch a Poké Ball!
HGSS.188.0008:
Touch the Poké Ball button to select.
Touch elsewhere to change your selection.
